input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.4.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.4.2.1
            TITLE: any wheel mounting system that uses a single retaining nut must incorporate a device to

            CONTENT:
            rule V.4.2.1: Any wheel mounting system that uses a single retaining nut must incorporate a device to
V.4.2.1 Any wheel mounting system that uses a single retaining nut must incorporate a device to 
retain the nut and the wheel if the nut loosens.   
A second nut (jam nut) does not meet this requirement

final_answer: Any wheel mounting system that uses a single retaining nut must incorporate a device to retain the nut and the wheel if the nut loosens. A second nut (jam nut) does not meet this requirement
